QW-160  TESTS REQUIRED — PROCEDURE QUALIFICATION. (a) The type and number of test specimens for procedure qualification shall be as required by QW-451 for the applicable thickness range. (b) For groove welds, tension and bend test specimens shall meet the requirements of QW-150. (c) For fillet welds, macro-examination and fracture tests shall be performed. Notch-toughness tests shall be performed in accordance with QW-170, when required by the referencing Code. For performance tests, see QW-301. Test coupons shall be welded subject to a qualified WPS per QW-200, unless exempted by QW-190 for certain examinations.
